name: shaded
description: Single-file WebGL landing/app experience for SHADED.

scripts.check: node --check tools/verify.js && node --check tools/verify-actors.js && node --check tools/verify-editor.js && node --check tools/verify-lenses.js && node --check tools/verify-costume-browser.js && node --check tools/verify-sprite-exporter.js && node --check tools/verify-dialogue.js && node --check tools/cost-format.mjs && node --check tools/test-cost-format.mjs && node --check tools/minizip.mjs && node --check tools/test-minizip.mjs && node --check tools/test-content-lint.mjs && node --check tools/build-scene-project.mjs && node --check tools/register.js && node --check tools/orchestrate.js && node --check editor/facade.js && node --check editor/facade.test.js && node --check editor/markerPainter.js && node --check editor/actorPlacer.js && node --check editor/storyboardTimeline.js && node --check editor/app.js && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('contracts/shaded-scene-project.schema.json','utf8'))" && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const h=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8'); const m=h.match(/<script>([\s\S]*)<\/script>/); if(!m) throw new Error('index.html script tag not found'); new Function(m[1]); console.log('index script parses')" && node tools/test-cost-format.mjs && node tools/test-minizip.mjs && node tools/test-content-lint.mjs
